Configuration for Crowdin integration with project ID and API token environment variables.

# Purpose
This configuration file specifies environment variables and file paths for a translation project. The `project_id_env` and `api_token_env` keys define the environment variables `CROWDIN_PROJECT_ID` and `CROWDIN_PERSONAL_TOKEN`, which are used for authentication and project identification. The `files` array contains objects that map a source file, `resources/normal/base/lang/tintin.pot`, to a translation file path, `resources/normal/base/lang/%locale_with_underscore%/tintin.po`, where `%locale_with_underscore%` is a placeholder for the locale identifier.
